description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical plastic juice bottle with a slightly tapered neck and a green screw cap. The front label displays the brand 'Simply Cranberry' and features an image of cranberries, indicating the juice flavor. The bottle is mostly transparent, revealing the deep red color of the juice inside, and has molded grip lines on the sides for easier handling. The back of the bottle shows a white nutritional information panel and additional product details. The cap is opaque green and appears to be made of plastic, matching the bottle's overall design. The bottle is typical of single-serve or family-sized juice containers found in urban environments such as convenience stores, parks, or picnic areas.
description: A tall, clear plastic bottle of cranberry juice with a green screw cap and a front label featuring cranberries and the 'Simply Cranberry' brand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Simply Cranberry' label and cranberry illustration.
description_view_1: Side view displaying molded grip lines and the bottle's transparent body.
description_view_2: Rear view with a visible nutritional information panel and product details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mostly plain with visible juice and bottle contours.
